firstSlide.title: Verification of Email for Two Factor Authentication
firstSlide.descirption: For security reason, we are obliged to make sure that the Email you entered for Two Factor Authentication, is owned by you. This is a one-time process for each submission number.

firstSlide.title: Verification of Cellphone for Two Factor Authentication
firstSlide.descirption: For security reason, we are obliged to make sure that the Cellphone Number you entered for Two Factor Authentication, is owned by you. This is a one-time process for each submission number.

whatsAppTier.tierUpdatedFailed: Tier was not saved. Please contact support.

regulationPopup.title: Pay attention!
regulationPopup.text:
For your attention, by activating Insert “Pending” Recipients as “Active” setting, you are requesting to cancel, in relation to all recipients who are added to the Pulseem system through external systems integrations, the sending of a confirmation email for the receipt of mail by Pulseem company in accordance with the requirements of the law.
Changing the aforementioned settings is carried out at your sole responsibility, and in doing so you confirm that Pulseem will not bear any responsibility for any damage caused to you and/or to Pulseem as a result, and therefore these damages will apply only to you.
regulationPopup.acceptAgreement: By clicking OK, I agree and accept the legal responsibility
regulationPopup.reEnterPassword: Re-Enter Password to complete the action
regulationPopup.selectAuthType: Choose a way to verify the account via email or SMS associated with this account:

popup.text:
Please note, you are about to change the default recipient removal settings.
The change of settings you intend to make will mean that when a recipient requests to remove himself from the distribution list, only the means of communication through which the recipient requested the removal will be removed - the phone number or the email address, as opposed to removing any means of communication provided by the recipient.

Changing the aforementioned settings is done at your sole responsibility, and by doing so you confirm that Pulseem will not bear any responsibility for any damage caused to you and/or Pulseem as a result and they will apply only to you.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.subTitle: Type the old password, then type the new one

responses.408: The new password must follow the rules
responses.409: The new password must be different then the old one!

apiSettings.title: API Settings
apiSettings.mainApiDesc: Main API - Provides ability to add an email campaign, to manage subscribers and groups from your system.
apiSettings.directSendApiDesc: Direct Send API - Direct send provides ability to send email like SMTP server. Most effective for CRM & ERP systems. All reports available only thru API.
apiSettings.mainApiExplainTitle: Using Web Service to connect to Pulseem:
apiSettings.mainApiExplainDesc:
Allows applications to communicate over the Internet without dependence on operating systems, software or hardware.

NEW! We have upgraded our API system to be more user-friendly and efficient to use. To view the methods and instructions for our new system, follow this link.

If you have any questions, please contact our support team at 03-5240290 or at support@pulseem.com.

*Please note that reports made with the new API will only show the data on campaigns sent through the new system.
apiSettings.reGenerateConfirm:
Creating a new API key will revoke the previous key.
Are you sure you want to create a new API key?
apiSettings.noAPIKeyAccess: In order to start using our API, please contact our support team on support@pulseem.com / 03-7172274
